tasks.title: Fix parser and lowering bugs in quench-runtime
tasks.notes: Computed access, template literals, for...of/in, spread, getters/setters, ??, in, instanceof, module fallback, lower/ submodules done. Still missing: break/continue, class, async/await, import/export, do...while, destructuring in for heads, rest patterns, TS parser mode, delete/unary+, optional chaining, BigInt, computed property names, private fields.

tasks.title: Complete Array, Map, Set, Promise, String, and Date built-ins
tasks.notes: Array methods, Map/Set methods, String/Date/Object.prototype, JSON.parse, Error, Function.prototype exist. Still missing or broken: Array.from iterables, Promise statics on constructor, callable new Array()/new Object(), Map insertion-order iteration, Set insertion order, Date.now, Date.toTimeString, Math trig/log functions, Number.prototype.toFixed, String/Number/Boolean boxing constructors.

tasks.title: Add missing language features to the interpreter
tasks.notes: Spread, getters/setters, typeof undeclared, for...of/in, ??, template literals work. Still missing: arguments object in JS-to-JS calls, optional chaining (depends on lowering), arrow rest params, destructuring params, break/continue propagation in loops, real Function.prototype.call/apply, inherited getters/setters.

tasks.title: Fix value and prototype model
tasks.notes: Shared prototypes and New wiring exist. Still missing: callable Array/Object constructors, boxing String/Number/Boolean constructors, correct instanceof prototype-chain walk, loose equality for objects/functions, Symbol truthy.

tasks.title: Fix bridge host functions and Ink globals in main crate
tasks.notes: All __ink_* functions are registered, including __ink_get_node_parent and __ink_set_raw_mode. Still needed: typed argument extraction helpers, safe JSON serialization in bridge functions, native function this binding.

tasks.title: Integrate event loop microtasks and verify dispatch
tasks.notes: Hot reload re-registers bridge functions on fresh context. Still broken: event-loop dispatch calls registered stubs instead of runtime.js handlers, Promise microtasks are never drained, __tb_invoke_microtasks not wired.

tasks.title: runtime.js compatibility tweaks
tasks.notes: normalizeChildren rewritten to avoid unimplemented Array.prototype.flat; runtime.js loads. Still needed: resolve native bridge function vs JS wrapper layering, fix compiler const reassignment in SHIMS, fix multi-line import handling.

tasks.title: Verify with parity tests and example apps
tasks.notes: simple.js may work; counter.js, use-bridge.tsx, animations.tsx are blocked by runtime gaps tracked in Task 14 and Task 26. Verification cannot be claimed until those are fixed.

tasks.title: Make build.rs enforce project lint rules on every *.rs file
tasks.notes: build.rs lints src/ and crates/quench-runtime/src/ but currently warns for non-compiler modules. Main crate still has file-length/function-length/complexity violations. Needs to be switched to panic on all *.rs violations and cover all directories.

tasks.title: Architecture hardening: split builtins and guard recursion
tasks.notes: Recursion guard implemented; lower/, eval_stmt/, builtins/, value/, interpreter/ split into submodules. HIR redesign is future work (Task 22).

tasks.title: Interpreter performance roadmap
tasks.notes: Future optimizations once runtime is correct: NaN-boxed Value, string interning, object shapes+ICs, slot-indexed environments, arena allocation, explicit eval stack.

tasks.title: Fix hook replacement in compiler (substring collision)
tasks.notes: prefix_hooks now uses regex word boundaries.

tasks.title: Fix Array.prototype.flat bug and missing globals
tasks.notes: flat() preserves non-array objects and returned array prototype; Infinity/NaN/undefined globals added.

tasks.title: Close remaining runtime gaps
tasks.notes: Not yet closed: optional chaining, destructuring assignment/params, arrow rest, arguments object, Promise statics on constructor, Array.from iterables, callable Array/Object constructors, microtask invocation in event loop, Map insertion-order iteration. See Task 26 for additional blockers.

tasks.title: Add TypeScript conformance submodule and test harness
tasks.notes: Submodule added; harness design documented. Implementation of the runner is now Task 28.

tasks.title: Audit TypeScript conformance tests and categorize runtime failures
tasks.notes: Blocked until Task 28 harness is implemented.

tasks.title: Pass TypeScript expression and statement conformance tests
tasks.notes: Blocked until parser/lowering gaps from Task 01 are closed.

tasks.title: Pass TypeScript function and class conformance tests
tasks.notes: Blocked until class lowering, destructuring params, and rest params are implemented.

tasks.title: Pass TypeScript iterator, module, and async conformance tests
tasks.notes: Blocked until import/export lowering, Map/Set iteration order, and async/await are implemented.

tasks.title: Stabilize conformance results and document supported subset
tasks.notes: Final phase after Tasks 17-19 pass.

tasks.title: Strip TypeScript syntax in the lowerer
tasks.notes: Blocked until swc is configured to parse TypeScript syntax (Task 01) and the HIR can represent stripped constructs.

tasks.title: Stabilize the HIR for runtime and future AOT
tasks.notes: Future architecture work; current runtime uses a conventional JS AST.

tasks.title: Improve diagnostics and error messages
tasks.notes: Future correctness/UX work; many lowering paths currently silently drop nodes.

tasks.title: Reactive execution engine over the HIR
tasks.notes: Future work; depends on Task 22 HIR.

tasks.title: Apply researched interpreter/AOT/JIT best practices
tasks.notes: Use swc front-end; interpreter-level optimizations first. AOT/JIT via Cranelift is future work.

tasks.title: Five-round architecture & code review findings
tasks.notes: Ranked findings from architecture/HIR, parser/lowering, interpreter/value, built-ins/host, and bridge/compiler reviews. Top blockers: event-loop dispatch, microtasks, hot reload, array prototypes, ==/instanceof.

tasks.title: Establish TDD baseline and unit test coverage
tasks.notes: Add regression/unit tests for Rank 1 and Rank 2 findings from Task 26 before fixing them; create the test harness layout in crates/quench-runtime/tests/.

tasks.title: Implement TypeScript conformance harness core
tasks.notes: Directive parser, multi-file case splitter, baseline extractor, skip/filter rules, and runner integration with quench-runtime::Context.

tasks.title: Run TypeScript conformance harness over whitelist and report results
tasks.notes: Blocked until Task 28 is done.

tasks.title: Run TypeScript's own conformance runner for reference
tasks.notes: Reference-only; not blocking.
